afterSnapshot.name: computeBestWindow
afterSnapshot.purpose: Find the calmest consecutive sailing window (lowest combined wind + gust) within an hourly forecast.

context.userMessage: Approved — go ahead and build it. Run the tests and type checks to verify nothing is broken, and show me what changed.

rationale: The window-finding algorithm is extracted as a pure function so it is unit-testable without network calls and keeps the handler thin.
implementation: Slides a fixed-length window across the clamped horizon, scoring each by the mean per-hour (windSpeed + windGusts); earliest window wins ties. Returns a descriptor with a human-readable reason string. Pure — no closure dependencies.
